final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an Amazon main product image for a grilling pan / baking tray.

Style/medium: clean white-background product photography, photorealistic
Composition: centered single product, full item visible, slight 3/4 angle to show depth and texture
Subject: grilling pan / baking tray, standalone, no props
Scene/backdrop: pure white background
Lighting/mood: soft even studio lighting, no harsh shadows
Color palette: neutral, true-to-product tones
Materials/textures: visible non-stick coating surface, metal construction
Text (verbatim):
Constraints: no brand name, no model number, no logo; product must be the sole focus
Avoid:岩谷, IWATANI, any model number, background clutter, human hands
